design_intent: Warm Japandi living room with raw linen, low-profile wood forms, wabi-sabi ceramics, muted earth tones, and quiet handmade imperfection in a calm, airy composition.

selected_pieces.product_name: Modern 3-Seater Sofa Premium Boucle Fabric Textured Sofa Couch with Wood Accent Armrests & Rubberwood Legs, Beige - ModernLuxe
selected_pieces.placement_note: Float centered on the main wall, slightly off the floor on slim legs, with the back kept visually light and the sofa aligned to face the coffee table.

selected_pieces.product_name: Arnaud Bent Wood modern Upholstered Accent Chair
selected_pieces.placement_note: Place angled near the sofa on the right side to create a quiet conversation nook, leaving open floor space beneath the curved frame.

selected_pieces.product_name: Wooden Round Pedestal Coffee Table - Natural
selected_pieces.placement_note: Center in front of the sofa with generous negative space around it, letting the round pedestal base read as a grounded sculptural mass.

selected_pieces.product_name: Nourison Textured Home Modern Indoor Rug Ivory Beige 7'10" x 9'10"
selected_pieces.placement_note: Lay beneath the front legs of the sofa and chair so the seating group sits fully grounded within a soft ivory-beige field.

selected_pieces.product_name: Modern Rattan TV Stand For TV Up To 65 Inch Entertainment Center Media Console Cabinet With Sliding Door,abstract,Light Wood,59in,4.92ft
selected_pieces.placement_note: Position along the media wall opposite the sofa, kept low and centered with the TV hovering above so the slatted doors remain the primary texture.

selected_pieces.product_name: 2pk Square Cotton Woven Stripe Throw Pillows Neutral/Ivory - Threshold™
selected_pieces.placement_note: Layer two pillows at the sofa corners, one slightly forward of the other, to add soft woven texture without breaking the palette.

selected_pieces.product_name: Modern Textured Ceramic Round Vase White - Threshold™
selected_pieces.placement_note: Set on the coffee table slightly off-center with a single clipped branch or left empty for a wabi-sabi, sculptural moment.

selected_pieces.product_name: Modern Ceramic Planter with Stand - White Ceramic Pot with Bamboo Base - Indoor & Outdoor Decorative Plant Holder - 8" White
selected_pieces.placement_note: Tuck near the window or a corner beside the media console to bring in a soft vertical note and a touch of living greenery.
